revision.comment: add {{[[Template:CatAutoTOC|CatAutoTOC]]}}, which will generate a table of contents (TOC) if the category has enough pages to need one
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (4 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: tidy cats/interwikis, add JA text & EN link
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}} {{Portal|Religion}} {{CatAutoTOC}} {{draft categories|
}} [[Category:14th-century Buddhists|Nuns]] [[Category:14th-century nuns|Buddhist]] [[Category:Buddhist nuns by century]] [[Category:Categories with 4 members]] [[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[en:Category:14th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:14th-century Buddhists|Nuns]] [[Category:14th-century nuns|Buddhist]] [[Category:Buddhist nuns by century]] [[Category:Categories with 4 members]] [[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 4 members
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}} {{Portal|Religion}} {{CatAutoTOC}} {{draft categories|
}} [[Category:14th-century Buddhists|Nuns]] [[Category:14th-century nuns|Buddhist]] [[Category:Buddhist nuns by century]]
[[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[en:Category:14th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:14th-century Buddhists|Nuns]] [[Category:14th-century nuns|Buddhist]] [[Category:Buddhist nuns by century]]
[[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs, add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: remove empty section(s)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q86304576)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Portal|Religion}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q86304576}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:14th-century Buddhist nuns]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:14th-century Buddhists|Nuns]]
[[Category:14th-century nuns|Buddhist]]
[[Category:Buddhist nuns by century]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22535397968|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=14th-century_Buddhist_nuns here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=14th-century_Buddhist_nuns for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<!--templates-->
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Portal|Religion}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q86304576}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:14th-century Buddhist nuns]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:14th-century Buddhists|Nuns]]
[[Category:14th-century nuns|Buddhist]]
[[Category:Buddhist nuns by century]]
